sessions.intent: Design action-based conditions for condition.if module

before.assumptions: Current condition.if has single bool Condition parameter. Expressions like '%x% > 5' stored as string but TypeMapping.ConvertTo cannot evaluate them. Multi-action steps already work in runtime2.
before.risk: Changing .pr format for conditions affects all existing condition tests. Builder prompt must be updated.

sessions.plan: Redesign condition.if with Left/Operator/Right parameters. Add condition.compare for compound intermediates. Add sub-step execution (indented blocks) to Steps.RunAsync using local skip state. Add pluggable IEvaluator provider pattern in module's providers/ folder. Update builder prompt with structured condition format.

actions.context: Full architectural design after three rounds of steering from Ingi. Covers condition restructuring, sub-step execution, pluggable providers.

Updated foundation checklist: marked system.sqlite, Setup.goal, Settings as DONE. Removed variable persistence and input action (modules, not core). Removed duplicate Builder Consistency Framework entry.

after.health: Plan approved by Ingi after 3 steering rounds
after.notes: Key decisions from Ingi: sub-steps are runtime not builder tricks (LLM non-determinism), Step is readonly/shared (no Execute flag), providers live in the module. Next: run test-designer.

sessions.intent: Design test suites for action-based conditions (condition.if, condition.compare, DefaultEvaluator, sub-step execution)

before.assumptions: Architect design is approved. Current condition.if has single bool Condition param. Steps.RunAsync has no sub-step logic yet. No C# unit tests exist for condition module.
before.risk: Must cover the full surface: evaluator operators, handler branching modes, sub-step skip logic, and PLang pipeline integration.

sessions.plan: 90 tests across 7 batches: DefaultEvaluator operators (22), logical/edge cases (14), IsTruthy (13), condition.if handler (8), condition.compare handler (3), Steps sub-step logic (9), PLang pipeline integration (21). Covers all operators, type normalization, null handling, sub-step execution, nested conditions, action-based conditions via file.exists, compound AND/OR.

actions.context: 69 C# TUnit test stubs across 4 files: DefaultEvaluator (49), If handler (8), Compare handler (3), Steps sub-step logic (9)
21 PLang pipeline test suites — each with .test.goal + supporting .goal files

after.status: Complete — 90 test stubs written (69 C#, 21 PLang)
after.health: All test files created, plan approved by user
after.notes: Ready for coder bot to implement production code. Key gaps filled vs architect suggestion: >=, <=, startswith, endswith, null handling, type normalization, action-based conditions via file.exists.
